message.content:
@startuml
participant Actor as "Activity"
participant BaseMediaActivity as "BaseMediaActivity"
participant MediaActivity as "MediaActivity"

Actor "Activity" ..> BaseMediaActivity : onCreate

BaseMediaActivity ..> BaseMediaActivity : set theme
BaseMediaActivity ..> BaseMediaActivity : setup navigation drawer

alt [new activity]
BaseMediaActivity ..> MediaActivity : getActionBarTitle()
BaseMediaActivity ..> BaseMediaActivity : set home icon to hamburger icon
BaseMediaActivity ..> BaseMediaActivity : get home icon and action bar title from saved instance
BaseMediaActivity ..> BaseMediaActivity : updateActionBar
alt [no fragment in layout (new activity)]
BaseMediaActivity ..> MediaActivity : createFragment()
BaseMediaActivity ..> BaseMediaActivity : add fragment
BaseMediaActivity ..> Activity : show fragment

Actor "Activity" ..> BaseMediaActivity : onCreateOptionsMenu
BaseMediaActivity ..> BaseMediaActivity : inflate generic menu items

Actor "Activity" ..> MediaActivity : user selects media item
BaseMediaActivity ..> MediaActivity : showFragment()
BaseMediaActivity ..> BaseMediaActivity : replace current fragment with new fragment
BaseMediaActivity ..> BaseMediaActivity : sets up the shared element transition and updates the dataholder
@enduml
